hub_subtitle: Business English for global coffee trading

lesson.menu_title: People and Things in the Office
lesson.subtitle: Aula 8 -- People and Things in the Office: Articles, Plurals and There is / There are
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernanda Gabriela Silva Rodrigues | Aula 8 -- People and Things in the Office

listenings.text: Hi Fernanda, this is Daniel with a quick note about the new transaction. There is a new contract on the system, and there are two invoices from the supplier. The shipment is large and urgent. We work with a reliable partner in Colombia. There is also a certificate for the warehouse. Please check the documents and tell me if anything is missing. Thank you.

Hi, this is Fernanda. Here is my update on the office documents. There are three new invoices on my desk. There is one old contract for the local client. The certificate is ready, and the report is complete. We have a reliable partner and a small but important shipment. There is nothing missing. Everything is in order. Thank you.

extra_audio.text: Fernanda checks the documents on her desk. First, there is a new contract. Then, there are two invoices from the supplier. Next, there is a certificate for the warehouse. Finally, the report is complete and ready to send.
